name: ios-design-review
tagline: Performs a visual design audit for iOS apps on real hardware, scoring against Apple HIG and best practices.
verdict: This skill provides a detailed visual design audit for iOS apps, scoring various dimensions and offering actionable feedback. It includes robust preamble logic for telemetry, configuration, and first-run experiences. The skill is well-structured with clear instructions and defined outputs, making it a valuable tool for design quality assurance. Security-wise
